Title: Test User Creation
Test Data: Valid email, familyCode, fullName, and pictureUrl
Test Steps:
1. Create a new User instance with the provided data
2. Verify that the User instance has been created correctly
Expected Result: The User instance is created successfully with the provided data

Title: Test Allattamento Creation
Test Data: Valid data, left, and right values
Test Steps:
1. Create a new Allattamento instance with the provided data
2. Verify that the Allattamento instance has been created correctly
Expected Result: The Allattamento instance is created successfully with the provided data

Title: Test Family Creation
Test Steps:
1. Create a new Famiglia instance
2. Verify that the Famiglia instance has been created correctly
Expected Result: The Famiglia instance is created successfully

Title: Test Parent-Child-Family Relationship
Preconditions: User, Allattamento, and Famiglia instances created
Test Data: Valid parent-child relationship and family relationship
Test Steps:
1. Associate the User instance with the Allattamento instance
2. Associate the User instance with the Famiglia instance
3. Verify that the relationships have been established correctly
Expected Result: The User instance is associated with both the Allattamento and Famiglia instances
